scripts.compile: node scripts/clean-output.js && tsc -p ./ && npm run bundle && node generate-package-json.js
scripts.verify: npm run compile && npm run lint && node scripts/verify-all.js
scripts.check:release: npm run verify && npm run test:integration && npm audit --audit-level=low && npm run package:list

view/item/context.title: %codebookmark.contributes.menus.view_item_context.1.title%
view/item/context.when: (view == codebookmarkTreeView) && (viewItem == bookmarkPinned || viewItem == bookmarkCodeMarkerPinnedDefault || viewItem == bookmarkCodeMarkerPinnedCustom)
